untranslatable_reason: Signal requires rolling OLS regression with dynamic hedge ratios and z-score calculations on residuals from paired asset spreads. These are not available in the allowed indicators list. OLS regression, residual z-scores, and multi-asset pair correlation metrics are custom statistical computations not present in standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: The signal describes a pairs trading strategy with mean reversion based on z-scores of OLS regression residuals. This requires: (1) computing rolling OLS regression between two paired assets, (2) calculating residuals, (3) computing z-scores of those residuals, (4) comparing against zscore_high (2.0) and zscore_low (0.75) thresholds. None of these intermediate calculations are available as pre-computed indicators. A practical approximation using mean reversion (price vs SMA) has been provided, but this does not capture the paired asset dynamics or statistical rigor of the original signal. Parameters ols_window=60, zscore_high=2.0, zscore_low=0.75 cannot be directly applied without custom indicator development.
